news.title: Best 2026 FIFA World Cup Ads From Adidas and Nike
news.lede: While the primary focus of the 2026 FIFA World Cup is on the football being played, it also offers a perfect opportunity for top sponsors like Adidas and Nike to celebrate their affiliated federations and athletes throughout the tournament. The celebrations commenced long before any of the teams stepped onto the pitch, as Adidas and Nike released their “Backyard Legends” and “Rip the Script” mini-films, respectively, in May. As the tournament began, football legends, including Ronaldo and Messi, as well as rising stars like Erling Haaland and Lamine Yamal, were honored with each accolade and win they racked up. Ahead of the World Cup Final on Sunday, July 19, between Argentina and Spain, we’ve rounded up the best ads from the 2026 World Cup.

news.title: 📸 World Cup: how the final match ball changed, 1930 to 2026
news.lede: Nearly a century separates the brown ball used in the first World Cup final in 1930 from the one that will be used at the 2026 edition. From the first hand-stitched models to the sophisticated “Trionda Final,” a true concentration of technology designed down to the smallest detail, the paradigm shift is total. On the occasion of the blockbuster clash between Spain and Argentina, let’s go back in time to look at the evolution of this iconic object, from 1930 to today. Kick-off for the Spain–Argentina final is this Sunday at 9 p.m.

news.title: Even Donald Trump Couldn’t Ruin the World Cup
news.lede: Donald Trump and his ally, FIFA president Gianni Infantino, have plumbed new depths with their political antics before and during the World Cup. But as David Goldblatt insists, they still couldn’t destroy the moments of collective joy it gives us. Football has the remarkable capacity to bring moments of resistance, of challenge, of joy, of beauty in an ugly world. (Julian Finney / FIFA via Getty Images).

news.title: World Cup Games Today: Time & Channel For Sunday’s World Cup Final
news.lede: Planning to watch today’s World Cup final? Here you can find everything you need to know to watch the highly anticipated match between Spain and Argentina. The final match in this year’s tournament will air on FOX (English broadcast), Telemundo (Spanish broadcast), and stream on FOX One. The final match in the 2026 World Cup will take place in New Jersey at MetLife Stadium.

news.title: Spain vs Argentina prediction for World Cup final: Prediction markets for World Cup final
news.lede: Add The Sporting News as a Preferred Source by clicking here. The ultimate prize in international soccer is on the line as Spain and Argentina clash in the final of the 2026 FIFA World Cup. With history on the line, this monumental showdown is set to kick off at 3:00 p.m. ET in East Rutherford, New Jersey.

news.title: FIFA accused of ‘tyranny’ after revoking Gazzetta’s World Cup Final accreditations
news.lede: Italian sports newspaper Gazzetta dello Sport had three of its five accreditations for the 2026 World Cup Final revoked, amid suspicions that FIFA punished the media for its criticism of the organisation of this summer’s tournament. La Gazzetta dello Sport, Italy’s most popular sports newspaper, will have just two correspondents for today’s World Cup Final in New York, rather than five. The newspaper’s Spain correspondent, Filippo Maria Ricci, was initially allocated a seat in the media tribune for the match, but it was later denied, with FIFA citing a lack of available space. After 38 days, 11 live games, 165 articles for Gazzetta, my World Cup comes to an abrupt and unexpected end just before the final,” Ricci wrote on X:.

news.title: Fifa gives fraud ‘an open door’ with betting, says Council of Europe chief
news.lede: Fifa deal with prediction market company under fire. Balogun reprieve showed ‘rules bend under pressure’. Fifa has been accused of providing an “open door to fraud” and allowing political influence to cast doubt on the integrity of the World Cup in a stinging rebuke by the Council of Europe’s secretary general. In an open letter published to coincide with Sunday’s final, Alain Berset also called for a new integrity framework to be built before the 2030 tournament, which is mainly being staged in Europe, and warned that Fifa was embroiled in a crisis involving money and power.

news.title: How to watch World Cup halftime show: TV and start time for BTS, Shakira, Madonna
news.lede: BTS, Justin Bieber, Madonna and Shakira are the co-headliners of this far-reaching lineup, which was curated by Coldplay's Chris Martin.
